name: Fudge Brownie Sundae Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spritz an 8x8 baking pan with cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt. Add 1/4 cup of cocoa powder.
4. Blend in the applesauce, vanilla extract, and soy milk until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. In another bowl, mix the brown sugar, remaining 1/4 cup cocoa, and hot water until well combined.
7. Pour the chocolate mixture over the batter in the pan.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the pan.
10. Optionally cover with a topping or serve plain. Spoon any formed chocolate sauce on top.
